name: excel-com-mcp
description: Model Context Protocol server for Excel (.xlsx): openpyxl plus optional Windows COM. filepath must match the workbook identity: absolute local path, OR (stdio, COM) the same https SharePoint/FullName string Excel uses (? ActiveWorkbook.FullName). Not the MCP wire transport: workbook_transport (auto|file|com) selects file vs Excel COM. M365 auth is via Excel, not the server. With EXCEL_MCP_ALLOWED_PATHS, https targets need EXCEL_MCP_ALLOWED_URL_PREFIXES. Developer MCP: uv run --project <repo-root> excel-com-mcp stdio. See README and TOOLS.md.

tools.name: save_workbook
tools.description: Save workbook to disk (explicit persist; use before file reads after COM writes without per-write save)

tools.name: create_worksheet
tools.description: Create a new worksheet in a workbook

tools.name: get_merged_cells
tools.description: Get list of merged cell ranges

tools.name: create_chart
tools.description: Create chart (line, bar, pie, scatter, etc.)

tools.name: copy_range
tools.description: Copy cell range to another location

tools.name: get_data_validation_info
tools.description: Get data validation rules for cell
